revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: Bot: categorize uncategorized category [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23879003569|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_needing_additional_references here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
